creator: pgollucci@p6m7g8.com
text:
We'll need an exp-run w/ the shar and a mod to Mk/bsd.perl.mk to change the default perl version to this one (5.15)
Once we mark things broken appropriately we can then repo copy lang/perl5.14 -> lang/perl5.15
and update it to this shar.

We'll also need to add the requiste conditional to Mk/bsd.perl.mk so it can actually be used when done.
